Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nelson Wild for Janet Standing (Executor).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to request for extraordinary fees. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
